core_aspects.description: Learn about vectors, their properties, and how they form spaces that follow specific rules of addition and scaling.
Understand matrices as grids of numbers used to solve equations and perform operations like addition, multiplication, and inversion.
Explore methods like substitution, elimination, and matrix approaches to solve systems of linear equations.
Study determinants, which are scalar values used to determine if a matrix is invertible and solve equations geometrically.
Discover real-world uses of linear algebra, such as in computer graphics, engineering, physics, and data science.
